title: myroxylon pubescens
intro: Myroxylon pubescens, also known as Palo Santo, is a tropical tree native to South America, particularly in Ecuador, Peru, and Bolivia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Palo Santo include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Palo Santo can be found in essential oils, incense sticks, and teas, which can be used for aromatherapy, meditation, and relaxation.
